Components.Name: MudDialogContainer
Components.Summary: An instance of a <see cref="MudDialog"/>.
Components.Description: When a <see cref="MudDialog"/> is shown, a new instance is created. This instance can then be used to perform actions such as hiding the dialog programmatically.

Parameters.Name: RightToLeft
Parameters.Description: Displays this dialog right-to-left.

Parameters.Name: Options
Parameters.Description: The options used for this dialog.

Parameters.Name: Title
Parameters.Description: The text displayed at the top of this dialog if <see cref="TitleContent" /> is not set.

Parameters.Name: TitleContent
Parameters.Description: The custom content at the top of this dialog.

Parameters.Name: Content
Parameters.Description: The content within this dialog.

Parameters.Name: CloseIcon
Parameters.Description: The custom icon displayed in the upper-right corner for closing this dialog.

Components.Name: MudCard
Components.Summary: Cards contain actions, text, or media like images or graphics. Keeping a card to a single subject keeps the design clean.

Parameters.Name: Elevation
Parameters.Description: The size of the drop shadow.

Parameters.Name: Square
Parameters.Description: Disables rounded corners.

Parameters.Name: Outlined
Parameters.Description: Displays an outline.

Parameters.Name: ContentPadding
Parameters.Description: Adds visual padding to the content (<see cref="MudCardHeader"/>, <see cref="MudCardContent"/> or <see cref="MudCardActions"/>).

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this component.

Examples.Name: Combined
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudCard>
    <MudCardHeader>
        <CardHeaderAvatar>
            <MudAvatar Color="Color.Secondary">I</MudAvatar>
        </CardHeaderAvatar>
        <CardHeaderContent>
            <MudText Typo="Typo.body1">Istra Croatia</MudText>
            <MudText Typo="Typo.body2">Peninsula in Europe</MudText>
        </CardHeaderContent>
        <CardHeaderActions>
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Settings" Color="Color.Default" />
        </CardHeaderActions>
    </MudCardHeader>
    <MudCardMedia Image="images/pilars.jpg" Height="250" />
    <MudCardContent>
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2">This photo was taken in a small village in Istra Croatia.</MudText>
    </MudCardContent>
    <MudCardActions>
        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Favorite" Color="Color.Default" />
        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Share" Color="Color.Default" />
    </MudCardActions>
</MudCard>

Components.Name: MudMainContent
Components.Summary: Represents the main content area of the <see cref="MudLayout"/>.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: Sets the content to be rendered inside the main content area.

Components.Name: MudNumericField
Components.Summary: A field for numeric values from users.

Parameters.Name: Clearable
Parameters.Description: Shows a button to clear the value.

Parameters.Name: ClearIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon of the clear button when <see cref="Clearable"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: InvertMouseWheel
Parameters.Description: Reverses the mouse wheel direction.

Parameters.Name: Min
Parameters.Description: The minimum allowed value.

Parameters.Name: Max
Parameters.Description: The maximum allowed value.

Parameters.Name: Step
Parameters.Description: The amount added or subtracted when changing values.

Parameters.Name: HideSpinButtons
Parameters.Description: Hides the up and down buttons.

Parameters.Name: InputMode
Parameters.Description: The type of value collected by this field.

Parameters.Name: Pattern
Parameters.Description: The regular expression used to constrain values.

Methods.Name: Increment
Methods.Description: Increases the current value by <see cref="Step"/>.

Methods.Name: Decrement
Methods.Description: Decreases the current value by <see cref="Step"/>.

Examples.Name: Change The Value With The Mouse Wheel
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_normal" InvertMouseWheel="@_invertMouseWheel" Label="Use Shift + Mouse Wheel" Variant="Variant.Outlined" />
<MudCheckBox Class="mt-3" @bind-Value="_invertMouseWheel" Label="Invert Mouse Wheel" Color="Color.Primary" />
Examples.CSharpCode:
double _normal = 0;
    bool _invertMouseWheel = false;
Examples.Code:
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_normal" InvertMouseWheel="@_invertMouseWheel" Label="Use Shift + Mouse Wheel" Variant="Variant.Outlined" />
<MudCheckBox Class="mt-3" @bind-Value="_invertMouseWheel" Label="Invert Mouse Wheel" Color="Color.Primary" />

@code {
double _normal = 0;
    bool _invertMouseWheel = false;
}
Examples.Title: Change The Value With The Mouse Wheel

Examples.Name: Debounced Numeric Field
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_normal" Label="Normal" HelperText="@_normal.ToString()" Variant="Variant.Outlined" />
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_immediate" Immediate="true" Label="Immediate" HelperText="@_immediate.ToString()" Variant="Variant.Outlined" />
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_debounced" DebounceInterval="500" OnDebounceIntervalElapsed="HandleIntervalElapsed" Label="Debounced" HelperText="@_debounced.ToString()" Variant="Variant.Outlined"  />
Examples.Code:
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_normal" Label="Normal" HelperText="@_normal.ToString()" Variant="Variant.Outlined" />
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_immediate" Immediate="true" Label="Immediate" HelperText="@_immediate.ToString()" Variant="Variant.Outlined" />
<MudNumericField @bind-Value="_debounced" DebounceInterval="500" OnDebounceIntervalElapsed="HandleIntervalElapsed" Label="Debounced" HelperText="@_debounced.ToString()" Variant="Variant.Outlined"  />

@code {
double _normal;
    double _immediate;
    double _debounced;

    void HandleIntervalElapsed(string debouncedText)
    {
        // At this stage, interval has elapsed.
    }
}
Examples.Title: Debounced Numeric Field

Components.Name: MudPaper

Parameters.Name: Outlined

Parameters.Name: Height

Parameters.Name: Width

Parameters.Name: MaxHeight

Parameters.Name: MaxWidth

Parameters.Name: MinHeight

Parameters.Name: MinWidth

Parameters.Name: ChildContent

Components.Name: MudList
Components.Summary: A scrollable list for displaying text, avatars, and icons. Use lists to help users find a specific item and act on it.
Components.Description: This component contains an optional <see cref="MudListSubheader"/> and one or more <see cref="MudListItem{T}"/>.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: The color of the selected list item.

Parameters.Name: CheckBoxColor
Parameters.Description: The color of checkboxes when <see cref="SelectionMode"/> is <see cref="SelectionMode.MultiSelection"/>.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this list.

Parameters.Name: ReadOnly
Parameters.Description: Prevents list items from being selected.

Parameters.Name: Padding
Parameters.Description: Applies vertical padding to this list.

Parameters.Name: Dense
Parameters.Description: Uses less vertical space for list items.

Parameters.Name: Gutters
Parameters.Description: Applies left and right padding to all list items.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Prevents any list item from being clicked.

Parameters.Name: SelectionMode
Parameters.Description: Controls how list items are selected.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValue
Parameters.Description: The currently selected value.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValueChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValue"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValues
Parameters.Description: The currently selected values.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValuesChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValues"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: Comparer
Parameters.Description: The comparer used to see if two list items are equal.

Parameters.Name: CheckedIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon to use for checked checkboxes when <see cref="SelectionMode"/> is <see cref="SelectionMode.MultiSelection"/>.

Parameters.Name: UncheckedIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon to use for unchecked checkboxes when <see cref="SelectionMode"/> is <see cref="SelectionMode.MultiSelection"/>.

Events.Name: SelectedValueChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValue"/> has changed.

Events.Name: SelectedValuesChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValues"/> has changed.

Examples.Name: Avatar
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudPaper Width="300px">
    <MudList T="string">
        <MudListItem>
            <AvatarContent>
                <MudAvatar>
                    <MudImage Src="images/mony.jpg"/>
                </MudAvatar>
            </AvatarContent>
            <ChildContent>
                Photos
            </ChildContent>

                Work
            </ChildContent>            
        </MudListItem>
        <MudListItem>
            <AvatarContent>
                <MudAvatar Color="Color.Tertiary">V</MudAvatar>
            </AvatarContent>
            <ChildContent>
                Vacation
            </ChildContent>              
        </MudListItem>
    </MudList>
</MudPaper>

Examples.Name: Interactive
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudGrid>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="6">
        <MudPaper Width="100%">
            <MudList T="string" ReadOnly="@ReadOnly" Dense="@Dense" Gutters="@Gutters" Disabled="@Disabled" Padding="@Padding">
                <MudListSubheader>Important Isotopes</MudListSubheader>
                <MudListItem Text="Hydrogen (H-1) - stable" Icon="@StableIcon" IconColor="@StableColor" Expanded>
                    <NestedList>
                        <MudListItem Text="Deuterium (H-2) - stable" Icon="@StableIcon" IconColor="@StableColor" />
                        <MudListItem Text="Tritium (H-3) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                    </NestedList>
                </MudListItem>
                <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-92) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor">
                    <NestedList>
                        <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-234) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                        <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-235) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                        <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-238) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                    </NestedList>
                </MudListItem>
            </MudList>
        </MudPaper>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="12" Class="d-flex">
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Dense" Label="Dense"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="ReadOnly" Label="ReadOnly"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Gutters" Label="Gutters"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Padding" Label="Padding"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Icon" Label="Icon"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="IconColor" Label="IconColor"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Disabled" Label="Disabled"/>
    </MudItem>
</MudGrid>
Examples.Code:
<MudGrid>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="6">
        <MudPaper Width="100%">
            <MudList T="string" ReadOnly="@ReadOnly" Dense="@Dense" Gutters="@Gutters" Disabled="@Disabled" Padding="@Padding">
                <MudListSubheader>Important Isotopes</MudListSubheader>
                <MudListItem Text="Hydrogen (H-1) - stable" Icon="@StableIcon" IconColor="@StableColor" Expanded>
                    <NestedList>
                        <MudListItem Text="Deuterium (H-2) - stable" Icon="@StableIcon" IconColor="@StableColor" />
                        <MudListItem Text="Tritium (H-3) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                    </NestedList>
                </MudListItem>
                <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-92) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor">
                    <NestedList>
                        <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-234) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                        <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-235) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                        <MudListItem Text="Uranium (U-238) - radioactive" Icon="@RadioactiveIcon" IconColor="@RadioactiveColor" />
                    </NestedList>
                </MudListItem>
            </MudList>
        </MudPaper>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="12" Class="d-flex">
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Dense" Label="Dense"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="ReadOnly" Label="ReadOnly"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Gutters" Label="Gutters"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Padding" Label="Padding"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Icon" Label="Icon"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="IconColor" Label="IconColor"/>
        <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="Disabled" Label="Disabled"/>
    </MudItem>
</MudGrid>

@code {
public bool Dense { get; set; }
    public bool ReadOnly { get; set; }
    public bool Gutters { get; set; } = true;
    public bool Padding { get; set; } = true;
    public bool Disabled { get; set; }
    public bool Icon { get; set; } = true;
    public bool IconColor { get; set; } = true;

    public string StableIcon => Icon ? Icons.Material.Filled.RadioButtonChecked : null;
    public string RadioactiveIcon => Icon ? Components.Name: MudMask
Components.Summary: A text input which conforms user input to a specific format while typing. <remarks> Note that MudMask is recommended to be used in WASM projects only because it has known problems in BSS, especially with high network latency. </remarks>

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this input.

Parameters.Name: Mask
Parameters.Description: The mask to apply to text values.

Parameters.Name: InputType
Parameters.Description: The type of the underlying input.

Parameters.Name: Clearable
Parameters.Description: Shows the clear button.

Parameters.Name: OnClearButtonClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the clear button is clicked.

Parameters.Name: ClearIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed when <see cref="Clearable" /> is <c>true</c>.

Events.Name: OnClearButtonClick
Events.Description: Occurs when the clear button is clicked.

Methods.Name: Clear
Methods.Description: Clears the text and value for this input.

Methods.Name: FocusAsync
Methods.Description: Sets the cursor to this input.

Methods.Name: SelectAsync
Methods.Description: Selects the text in this input.

Methods.Name: SelectRangeAsync
Methods.Description: Selects a range of characters in this input.

Methods.Name: OnSelect
Methods.Description: Occurs when the selected characters have changed.

Components.Name: MudTreeView
Components.Summary: An extensively customizable tree view component for displaying hierarchical data, featuring item selection, lazy-loading, and templating support.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: The color of the selected item.

Parameters.Name: CheckBoxColor
Parameters.Description: The color of checkboxes.

Parameters.Name: SelectionMode
Parameters.Description: Controls how many items can be selected at one time.

Parameters.Name: TriState
Parameters.Description: Uses checkboxes which support an undetermined state.

Parameters.Name: AutoSelectParent
Parameters.Description: Automatically checks an item if all children are selected.

Parameters.Name: ExpandOnClick
Parameters.Description: Expands an item with children if it is clicked anywhere (not just the expand/collapse buttons).

Parameters.Name: ExpandOnDoubleClick
Parameters.Description: Expands an item with children if it is double-clicked anywhere (not just the expand/collapse buttons).

Parameters.Name: AutoExpand
Parameters.Description: Automatically expands items to show selected children.

Parameters.Name: Hover
Parameters.Description: Shows an effect when items are hovered over.

Parameters.Name: Dense
Parameters.Description: Uses compact vertical padding.

Parameters.Name: Height
Parameters.Description: Sets a fixed height.

Parameters.Name: MaxHeight
Parameters.Description: Sets a maximum height.

Parameters.Name: Width
Parameters.Description: Sets a fixed width.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Prevents the user from interacting with any items.

Parameters.Name: FilterFunc
Parameters.Description: Determines whether items are displayed.

Parameters.Name: Ripple
Parameters.Description: Shows a ripple effect when an item is clicked.

Parameters.Name: Items
Parameters.Description: The items being displayed.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValue
Parameters.Description: The currently selected value.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValueChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValue"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValues
Parameters.Description: The currently selected values.

Parameters.Name: SelectedValuesChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValues"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this component.

Parameters.Name: ItemTemplate
Parameters.Description: The template for rendering each item.

Parameters.Name: Comparer
Parameters.Description: The comparer used to check if two items are equal.

Parameters.Name: ServerData
Parameters.Description: The function for asynchronously loading items.

Parameters.Name: ReadOnly
Parameters.Description: Prevents selections from being changed.

Parameters.Name: CheckedIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed for checked items.

Parameters.Name: UncheckedIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed for unchecked items.

Parameters.Name: IndeterminateIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed for indeterminate items.

Events.Name: SelectedValueChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValue"/> has changed.

Events.Name: SelectedValuesChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="SelectedValues"/> has changed.

Methods.Name: FilterAsync
Methods.Description: Filters all items based on the <see cref="FilterFunc"/> function.

Methods.Name: ExpandAllAsync
Methods.Description: Expands all items and their children.

Methods.Name: CollapseAllAsync
Methods.Description: Collapses all items and their children.

Examples.Name: Auto Expand
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudPaper Width="300px" Elevation="0">
    <MudTreeView @ref="TreeView" Hover AutoExpand="@AutoExpand" @bind-SelectedValue="SelectedValue" SelectionMode="@SelectionMode.ToggleSelection">
        <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("C:")" Icon="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.Folder" IconExpanded="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.FolderOpen">
            <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("config")" Icon="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.Folder" IconExpanded="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.FolderOpen">
                <MudTreeViewItem Value='"launch.json"' Icon="@Icons.Custom.FileFormats.FileCode" />
                <MudTreeViewItem Value='"tasks.json"' Icon="@Icons.Custom.FileFormats.FileCode" />
            </MudTreeViewItem>
            <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("images")" Icon="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.Folder" IconExpanded="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.FolderOpen">
                <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("logo.png")" Icon="@Icons.Custom.FileFormats.FileImage" />
            </MudTreeViewItem>
        </MudTreeViewItem>
    </MudTreeView>
</MudPaper>

<MudStack Row Justify="Justify.Center" Style="width: 100%" Wrap="Wrap.Wrap">
    <MudButton Color="Color.Primary" OnClick="@(()=>TreeView.ExpandAllAsync())" Variant="Variant.Filled">Expand all</MudButton>
    <MudButton Color="Color.Dark" OnClick="@(()=>TreeView.CollapseAllAsync())" Variant="Variant.Filled">Collapse all</MudButton>
    <MudChipSet T="string" @bind-SelectedValue="SelectedValue" Color="Color.Primary" Variant="Variant.Text" SelectionMode="@SelectionMode.ToggleSelection">
        <MudChip Text="config"/>
        <MudChip Text="launch.json"/>
        <MudChip Text="tasks.json"/>
        <MudChip Text="images"/>
        <MudChip Text="logo.png"/>
    </MudChipSet>
    <MudSwitch @bind-Value="AutoExpand" Color="Color.Primary">AutoExpand</MudSwitch>
</MudStack>

Examples.Name: Custom
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudStack>
    <MudPaper Width="400px" MaxHeight="400px" Class="overflow-y-auto" Elevation="2">
        <MudTreeView Items="@TreeItems" ReadOnly>
            <ItemTemplate>
                @{                
                    var product = context.Value; // for convenient usage in the template
                }
                <MudTreeViewItem @bind-Expanded="@context.Expanded" Items="@context.Children" Value="@context.Value">
                    <Content>
                        <MudTreeViewItemToggleButton @bind-Expanded="@context.Expanded" Visible="@context.HasChildren" />
                        @if (product?.Price is not null) {
                            <MudCheckBox T="bool" Size="Size.Small" Value="@context.Selected" ValueChanged="@((v)=> OnCheckboxChanged(v, context))" />
                        }
                        <MudIcon Icon="@product?.Icon" Class="ml-0 mr-2" Color="@Color.Default" />
                        <MudText>@product?.Name</MudText>
                        @if (product?.Price is not null) {
                            <MudChip Class="ml-1">@product.Price.Value.ToString("C")</MudChip>
                        }
                    </Content>
                </MudTreeViewItem>
            </ItemTemplate>
        </MudTreeView>
    </MudPaper>
    <MudStack Class="mt-3" Style="width: 400px">
        <MudText Typo="@Typo.subtitle1" Inline>Selected items: @(string.Join(", ", (SelectedValues ?? []).Select(x => x.Name)))</MudText>
        <MudStack>
            <MudText Typo="@Typo.subtitle1">Sum: <MudChip T="string">@GetSelectedSum().ToString("C")</MudChip></MudText>
        </MudStack>
    </MudStack>
</MudStack>

@code {
public void OnCheckboxChanged(bool selected, ITreeItemData<Product> context)
    {
        context.Selected = selected;
        if (context.Value?.Price is null)
            return;
        if (context.Selected)
            SelectedValues.Add(context.Value);
        else
            SelectedValues.Remove(context.Value);
    }

    public HashSet<Product> SelectedValues { get; set; } = new();

    public List<TreeItemData<Product>> TreeItems { get; set; } = new();

    public class Product : IEquatable<Product>
    {
        public decimal? Price { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; init; }
        public string Icon { get; set; }

        public Product(string name, string icon, decimal? price = null)
        {
            Name = name;
            Icon = icon;
            Price = price;
        }

        public bool Equals(Product other)
        {
            if (ReferenceEquals(null, other)) return false;
            if (ReferenceEquals(this, other)) return true;
            return Name == other.Name;
        }

        public override bool Equals(object obj) => ReferenceEquals(this, obj) || obj is Product other && Equals(other);

        public override int GetHashCode() => Name?.GetHashCode() ?? 0;
    }

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        TreeItems.Add(new TreeItemData<Product> { 
            Value=new Product("Coffee Makers", Icons.Material.Filled.Label), 
            Expanded = true,
            Children = [
                new TreeItemData<Product> { Value=new Product("Moka Pot", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 36.99m),  },
                new TreeItemData<Product> { 
                    Value=new Product("French Press", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 19.99m),
                    Expanded = true,
                    Children = [ 
                        new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Spare Sieve", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 6.00m) },
                        new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Cleaning Kit", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 17.59m) }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        });
        TreeItems.Add(new TreeItemData<Product> {
            Value = new Product("Tea Pots", Icons.Material.Filled.Label),
            Expanded = true,
            Children = [
                new TreeItemData<Product> {
                    Value=new Product("Glass Teapot", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 36.99m),
                    Expanded = true,
                    Children = [ 
                        new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Glass Infuser", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 2.99m) }, 
                        new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Stainless Steel Infuser", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 5.99m) }
                    ]
                },
                new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Stainless Steel Teapot", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 14.15m) },
                new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Japanese Cast Iron Teapot", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 26.39m) },
                new TreeItemData<Product> { Value = new Product("Porcelain Teapot", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 38.00m) }
            ]
        });
    }

    public decimal GetSelectedSum()
    {
        if (SelectedValues is null)
            return 0;
        return SelectedValues.Sum(p => p.Price ?? 0);
    }
}

@code {
private List<TreeItemData<string>> _treeItemData = [];

    private MudTreeView<string> _treeView;

    private string _searchPhrase;

    public class TreeItemPresenter : TreeItemData<string>
    {
        public TreeItemPresenter(string text, string icon) : base(text)
        {
            Text = text;
            Icon = icon;
        }
    }

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _treeItemData.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("All Mail", Icons.Material.Filled.Email));
        _treeItemData.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("Trash", Icons.Material.Filled.Delete));
        _treeItemData.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("Categories", Icons.Material.Filled.Label)
        {
            Expanded = true,
            Children =
            [
                new TreeItemPresenter("Social", Icons.Material.Filled.Group),
                new TreeItemPresenter("Updates", Icons.Material.Filled.Info),
                new TreeItemPresenter("Forums", Icons.Material.Filled.QuestionAnswer),
                new TreeItemPresenter("Promotions", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer)
            ]
        });
        _treeItemData.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("History", Icons.Material.Filled.Label));
    }

    private async void OnTextChanged(string searchPhrase) 
    {
        _searchPhrase = searchPhrase;
        await _treeView.FilterAsync();
    }

    private Task<bool> MatchesName(ITreeItemData<string> item)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.Text))
        {
            return Task.FromResult(false);
        }

        return Task.FromResult(item.Text.Contains(_searchPhrase, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
    }
}

@code {
public IReadOnlyCollection<string> SelectedValues { get; set; }

    public List<TreeItemData<string>> TreeItems { get; set; } = new();
    public Dictionary<string, int?> ValueMap { get; set; }

    public class TreeItemPresenter : TreeItemData<string>
    {
        public int? Number { get; set; }

        public TreeItemPresenter(string text, string icon, int? number = null) : base(text)
        {
            Text = text;
            Icon = icon;
            Number = number;
        }
    }

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        TreeItems.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("All Mail", Icons.Material.Filled.Email));
        TreeItems.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("Trash", Icons.Material.Filled.Delete));
        TreeItems.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("Categories", Icons.Material.Filled.Label) {
            Expanded = true,
            Children = [
                    new TreeItemPresenter("Social", Icons.Material.Filled.Group, 90),
                    new TreeItemPresenter("Updates", Icons.Material.Filled.Info, 2294),
                    new TreeItemPresenter("Forums", Icons.Material.Filled.QuestionAnswer, 3566),
                    new TreeItemPresenter("Promotions", Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, 733)
                ]
        });
        TreeItems.Add(new TreeItemPresenter("History", Icons.Material.Filled.Label));
        ValueMap = TreeItems.Concat(TreeItems.SelectMany(x => x.Children ?? [])).OfType<TreeItemPresenter>().ToDictionary(x => x.Value, x => x.Number);
    }

    public int GetSelectedSum()
    {
        if (SelectedValues is null)
            return 0;
        return SelectedValues.Select(x => ValueMap.GetValueOrDefault(x, 0)).Sum(i => i ?? 0);
    }
}

@code {
private List<TreeItemData<string>> InitialTreeItems { get; set; } = new();
    private int _idCounter=1; // <- the counter makes sure the generated items are unique

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        // MudTreeView initially only gets these top-level items
        InitialTreeItems.Add(new TreeItemData<string> {
            Value = "All Mail", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.Label,
            Expanded = true,
            Children = [
                new TreeItemData<string> { Value = "Promotions", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.Group, },
                new TreeItemData<string> { Value = "Updates", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.Info, },
                new TreeItemData<string> { Value = "Forums", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.QuestionAnswer, Expandable = false },
                new TreeItemData<string> { Value = "Social", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.LocalOffer, Expandable = false }
            ] });
        InitialTreeItems.Add(new TreeItemData<string> { Value = "Trash", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.Delete });
    }

    public async Task<IReadOnlyCollection<TreeItemData<string>>> LoadServerData(string parentValue)
    {
        // wait 500ms to simulate a server load
        await Task.Delay(500);
        // normally you would use the parentValue to query your server for the children of the given parent
        // but for the sake of this example we will just return some hardcoded children
        return [
            new TreeItemData<string> { Value = $"More Spam ({_idCounter++})", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.Group, },
            new TreeItemData<string> { Value = $"L.E.D Door Mats ({_idCounter++})", Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.Lightbulb, Expandable = false },
            new TreeItemData<string> { Value = $"Car Beauty Salon ({_idCounter++})", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.CarRepair, Expandable = false },
            new TreeItemData<string> { Value = $"Fakedoors.com ({_idCounter++})", Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.DoorFront, Expandable = false },
            new TreeItemData<string> { Value = $"Bluetooth Toilet ({_idCounter++})", Icon = Icons.Material.Filled.Wc, Expandable = false }
        ];        
    }
}

        <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("config")" Expanded Icon="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.Folder" IconExpanded="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.FolderOpen">
            <MudTreeViewItem Value='"launch.json"' Icon="@Icons.Custom.FileFormats.FileCode" />
            <MudTreeViewItem Value='"tasks.json"' Icon="@Icons.Custom.FileFormats.FileCode" />
        </MudTreeViewItem>
        <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("images")" Icon="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.Folder" IconExpanded="@Icons.Custom.Uncategorized.FolderOpen">
            <MudTreeViewItem Value="@("logo.png")" Icon="@Icons.Custom.FileFormats.FileImage" />
        </MudTreeViewItem>
    </MudTreeView>
</MudPaper>

<MudStack Row Justify="Justify.Center" Style="width: 100%" Wrap="Wrap.Wrap">
    <MudRadioGroup @bind-Value="SelectionMode">
        <MudRadio Value="SelectionMode.SingleSelection" Color="Color.Primary">SingleSelection</MudRadio>
        <MudRadio Value="SelectionMode.ToggleSelection" Color="Color.Primary">ToggleSelection</MudRadio>
    </MudRadioGroup>
    <MudChipSet T="string" @bind-SelectedValue="SelectedValue" Color="Color.Primary" Variant="Variant.Text">
        <MudChip Text="config"/>
        <MudChip Text="launch.json"/>
        <MudChip Text="tasks.json"/>
        <MudChip Text="images"/>
        <MudChip Text="logo.png"/>
    </MudChipSet>
    <MudSwitch @bind-Value="ReadOnly" Color="Color.Primary">ReadOnly</MudSwitch>    
</MudStack>

@code {
public string SelectedValue = "tasks.json";
    public bool ReadOnly = false;
    public SelectionMode SelectionMode = SelectionMode.SingleSelection;
}

Components.Name: MudExpansionPanel
Components.Summary: A component which can be expanded to show more content or collapsed to show only its header.
Components.Description: This component is always inside a <see cref="MudExpansionPanels"/> component.

Parameters.Name: MaxHeight
Parameters.Description: The maximum allowed height, in pixels.

Parameters.Name: HeaderClass
Parameters.Description: User class names, separated by space.

Parameters.Name: TitleContent
Parameters.Description: The content within the title area.

Parameters.Name: Text
Parameters.Description: The text displayed in this panel, if <see cref="TitleContent"/> is not set.

Parameters.Name: HideIcon
Parameters.Description: Hides the expand icon.

Parameters.Name: Icon
Parameters.Description: The icon for expanding this panel.

Parameters.Name: Dense
Parameters.Description: Removes vertical padding from the panel.

Parameters.Name: Gutters
Parameters.Description: Adds left and right padding.

Parameters.Name: ExpandedChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Expanded"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: Expanded
Parameters.Description: Displays the panel content.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Disables user interaction and prevents <see cref="ToggleExpansionAsync"/>.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this panel.

Parameters.Name: KeepContentAlive
Parameters.Description: When true, the content remains in the DOM even when the panel is collapsed.

Events.Name: ExpandedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Expanded"/> has changed.

Methods.Name: ToggleExpansionAsync
Methods.Description: Shows or hides the content in this panel.

Methods.Name: ExpandAsync
Methods.Description: Shows the content in this panel.

Methods.Name: CollapseAsync
Methods.Description: Hides the content in this panel.

Examples.Name: Async
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudExpansionPanels>
    <MudExpansionPanel Text="Panel with async loaded contents" MaxHeight="1000" ExpandedChanged="OnExpandedChanged">
        @_panelContent
    </MudExpansionPanel>
</MudExpansionPanels>
Examples.Code:
@_panelContent @code { private RenderFragment _panelContent; private async Task OnExpandedChanged(bool newVal) { if (newVal) { await Task.Delay(600); _panelContent = _bigAsyncContent; } else { // Reset after a while to prevent sudden collapse. Task.Delay(350).ContinueWith(t => _panelContent = null).CatchAndLog(); } } private RenderFragment _bigAsyncContent = __builder => {
The expansion of the
inner panel is done after
ExpandedChanged
has completed to allow for
smooth opening of async data
of initially unknown height.
}; }
Examples.Title: Async

Examples.Name: Padding
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4">Default Gutters (Gutters="true")</MudText>
<MudExpansionPanels Class="mb-6">
    <MudExpansionPanel Text="Panel with Gutters" Gutters="true">
        <MudText>Both header and content have 24px horizontal padding (gutters).</MudText>
        <MudText>This is the default behavior when Gutters is not specified.</MudText>
    </MudExpansionPanel>
</MudExpansionPanels>

<MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4">No Gutters (Gutters="false")</MudText>
<MudExpansionPanels Class="mb-6">
    <MudExpansionPanel Text="Panel without Gutters" Gutters="false">
        <MudText>Both header and content have no horizontal padding.</MudText>
        <MudText>Notice how the text aligns to the left edge.</MudText>
    </MudExpansionPanel>
</MudExpansionPanels>

<MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4">Dense Panels</MudText>
<MudExpansionPanels Class="mb-6">
    <MudExpansionPanel Text="Dense with Gutters" Dense Gutters>
        Dense removes vertical padding from content while keeping horizontal gutters.
    </MudExpansionPanel>
    <MudExpansionPanel Text="Dense without Gutters" Dense Gutters="false">
        Dense with no gutters - minimal padding on all sides.
    </MudExpansionPanel>
</MudExpansionPanels>

<MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4">Parent Controls Gutters</MudText>
<MudExpansionPanels Dense Gutters="false">
    <MudExpansionPanel Text="Gutters inherited from parent">
        When the parent MudExpansionPanels has Gutters="false", all child panels inherit this setting.
    </MudExpansionPanel>
</MudExpansionPanels>
Examples.Code:

<MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4">No Gutters (Gutters="false")</MudText>

</MudExpansionPanels>

<MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4">Dense Panels</MudText>
<MudExpansionPanels Class="mb-6">

Components.Name: MudText
Components.Summary: A customizable piece of text.

Parameters.Name: RightToLeft
Parameters.Description: Whether text is displayed right-to-left.

Parameters.Name: Typo
Parameters.Description: The theme style of the text.

Parameters.Name: Align
Parameters.Description: The horizontal alignment of this text.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: The color of this text.

Parameters.Name: GutterBottom
Parameters.Description: Adds a bottom margin.

Parameters.Name: Inline
Parameters.Description: Whether this text continues on the same line.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The child content to display.

Parameters.Name: HtmlTag
Parameters.Description: The HTML element used for this text. that will be rendered (Example: <c>span</c>, <c>p</c>, <c>h1</c>).

Components.Name: MudNavLink
Components.Summary: A navigation link as part of a <see cref="MudNavMenu"/>.

Parameters.Name: Icon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed for this link.

Parameters.Name: IconColor
Parameters.Description: The color of the icon when <see cref="Icon"/> is set.

Parameters.Name: Match
Parameters.Description: Controls when this link is highlighted.

Parameters.Name: Target
Parameters.Description: The browser frame to open this link when <see cref="Href"/> is specified.

Parameters.Name: ActiveClass
Parameters.Description: The CSS applied when this link is active.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Prevents the user from interacting with this link.

Parameters.Name: Ripple
Parameters.Description: Shows a ripple effect when the user clicks this link.

Parameters.Name: Href
Parameters.Description: The URL to navigate to when this link is clicked.

Parameters.Name: ForceLoad
Parameters.Description: Performs a full page load during navigation.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this link.

Parameters.Name: OnClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when this link has been clicked.

Events.Name: OnClick
Events.Description: Occurs when this link has been clicked.

Components.Name: MudLayout
Components.Summary: A component which defines a common structure for multiple pages.
Components.Description: Layouts often contain <see cref="MudAppBar"/> and <see cref="MudDrawer"/> components. The <see cref="MudMainContent"/> component is used to contain page content. In your layout component, but above this component, add <see cref="MudThemeProvider"/>, <see cref="MudPopoverProvider"/>, <see cref="MudDialogProvider"/>, and <see cref="MudSnackbarProvider"/> components to enable all MudBlazor features.

Components.Name: MudListItem
Components.Summary: An item within a <see cref="MudList{T}"/> component.

Parameters.Name: Text
Parameters.Description: The text to display.

Parameters.Name: SecondaryText
Parameters.Description: The secondary text displayed.

Parameters.Name: Value
Parameters.Description: The value associated with this item.

Parameters.Name: AvatarContent
Parameters.Description: The custom <see cref="MudAvatar" /> to display to the left of <see cref="Text"/>.

Parameters.Name: Href
Parameters.Description: The URL to navigate to upon click.

Parameters.Name: Target
Parameters.Description: The browser frame to open this link when <see cref="Href"/> is specified.

Parameters.Name: ForceLoad
Parameters.Description: Causes a full page refresh when this list item is clicked and <see cref="Href"/> is set.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Prevents this list item from being clicked.

Parameters.Name: Ripple
Parameters.Description: Shows a ripple effect when this item is clicked.

Parameters.Name: Icon
Parameters.Description: The icon to display for this list item.

Parameters.Name: IconColor
Parameters.Description: The color of the <see cref="Icon"/>.

Parameters.Name: IconSize
Parameters.Description: The size of the <see cref="Icon"/>.

Parameters.Name: ExpandIconColor
Parameters.Description: The color of the <see cref="ExpandLessIcon"/> and <see cref="ExpandMoreIcon"/> icons.

Parameters.Name: ExpandLessIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed when <see cref="Expanded"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: ExpandMoreIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed when <see cref="Expanded"/> is <c>false</c>.

Parameters.Name: Inset
Parameters.Description: Applies an indent to this list item.

Parameters.Name: Dense
Parameters.Description: Uses less vertical padding between items.

Parameters.Name: Gutters
Parameters.Description: Applies left and right padding to this list items.

Parameters.Name: Expanded
Parameters.Description: Expand or collapse nested list. Two-way bindable. Note: if you directly set this to true or false (instead of using two-way binding) it will initialize the nested list's expansion state.

Parameters.Name: ExpandedChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Expanded"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: Display content of this list item. If set, this overrides Text

Parameters.Name: OnClickPreventDefault
Parameters.Description: If set, clicking the list item will only execute the OnClick handler and prevent all other functionality such as following Href or selection.

Parameters.Name: NestedList
Parameters.Description: Add child list items here to create a nested list.

Parameters.Name: OnClick
Parameters.Description: List click event. Also called when <see cref="Href"/> is set

Events.Name: ExpandedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Expanded"/> has changed.

Events.Name: OnClick
Events.Description: List click event. Also called when <see cref="Href"/> is set

Components.Name: MudDataGridPager

Parameters.Name: DataGrid

Parameters.Name: PageSizeSelector

Parameters.Name: PageSizeOptions

Parameters.Name: InfoFormat

Parameters.Name: ShowNavigation

Parameters.Name: ShowPageNumber
Parameters.Description: Shows the current page number.

Parameters.Name: AllItemsText
Parameters.Description: Defines the text shown in the items per page dropdown when a user provides int.MaxValue as an option

Components.Name: MudDialog

Parameters.Name: TitleContent

Parameters.Name: DialogContent

Parameters.Name: DialogActions

Parameters.Name: Options
Parameters.Description: The default options for this dialog.

Parameters.Name: OnBackdropClick

Parameters.Name: OnKeyDown
Parameters.Description: Occurs when a key has been pressed down.

Parameters.Name: OnKeyUp
Parameters.Description: Occurs when a pressed key has been released.

Parameters.Name: Gutters

Parameters.Name: TitleClass

Parameters.Name: ContentClass

Parameters.Name: ActionsClass

Parameters.Name: ContentStyle
Parameters.Description: The CSS styles applied to the main dialog content.

Parameters.Name: Visible
Parameters.Description: For inline dialogs, shows this dialog.

Parameters.Name: VisibleChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Visible"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: DefaultFocus
Parameters.Description: The element which will receive focus when this dialog is shown.

Events.Name: OnBackdropClick
Events.Description: Occurs when the area outside the dialog has been clicked if <see cref="DialogOptions.BackdropClick"/> is <c>true</c>.

Events.Name: OnKeyDown
Events.Description: Occurs when a key has been pressed down.

Events.Name: OnKeyUp
Events.Description: Occurs when a pressed key has been released.

Events.Name: VisibleChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Visible"/> has changed.

Methods.Name: ShowAsync

Methods.Name: CloseAsync

</MudButton>

<style>
    .my-custom-class {
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }
</style>
Examples.Code:
<MudButton @onclick="OpenDialogAsync" Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary">
    Open blurry dialog
</MudButton>

<style>
    .my-custom-class {
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    }
</style>

@code {
private Task OpenDialogAsync()
    {
        var options = new DialogOptions { BackgroundClass = "my-custom-class" };

        return DialogService.ShowAsync<DialogBlurryExample_Dialog>("Simple Dialog", options);
    }
}

Examples.Name: Blurry Example_ Dialog

<MudDialog>
    <DialogContent>
        Dialog Content
    </DialogContent>
    <DialogActions>
        <MudButton OnClick="Cancel">Cancel</MudButton>
        <MudButton Color="Color.Primary" OnClick="Submit">OK</MudButton>
    </DialogActions>

    <DialogContent>

    </DialogActions>
</MudDialog>

@code {
[CascadingParameter]
    private IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; }

    private void Submit() => MudDialog.Close(DialogResult.Ok(true));

    private void Cancel() => MudDialog.Cancel();
}

string _returnValue = "Dialog return value (not yet set)";

    private async Task OpenDialogAsync()
    {    
        var options = new DialogOptions { CloseOnEscapeKey = true };
        var dialogReference = await DialogService.ShowAsync<DialogKeyboardNavigationExample_Dialog>("Dialog Keyboard Accessibility Demo", options);
        _returnValue = "Waiting for dialog to conclude ...";
        StateHasChanged();
        var dialogResult = await dialogReference.Result;
        if (dialogResult.Canceled) {

Examples.Code:
<MudDialog OnKeyDown="OnKeyDownAsync">
    <DialogContent>
        <MudText>Select your favourite coffee. Hit Enter to accept or Escape to cancel.</MudText>
        <MudSelect T="string" Label="Favorite Coffee" @bind-Value="_returnValue">
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("Cappuccino")" />
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("Cafe Latte")" />
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("Espresso")" />
            <MudSelectItem Value="@("Irish Coffee")" />
        </MudSelect>
    </DialogContent>
    <DialogActions>
        <MudButton OnClick="Cancel">Cancel</MudButton>
        <MudButton Color="Color.Primary" OnClick="Submit">OK</MudButton>
    </DialogActions>
</MudDialog>

@code {
[Inject] 
    private IDialogService DialogService { get; set; } // for MessageBox

    [CascadingParameter]
    private IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; }

    private string _returnValue;

    private void Submit() => MudDialog.Close(DialogResult.Ok(_returnValue));

    private void Cancel() => MudDialog.Cancel();

    private async Task OnKeyDownAsync(KeyboardEventArgs args)
    {
        switch(args.Key) {
            case "Enter":
            case "NumpadEnter":
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_returnValue)) {
                    await DialogService.ShowMessageBoxAsync(
                        "Sorry",
                        @"You must either select a coffee and close with Enter or cancel with Escape!", 
                        yesText:"Got it", 
                        options: new DialogOptions() { CloseOnEscapeKey = true });
                    return;
                }
                Submit();
                break;
        }
    }
}

@code { private async Task DeleteServerAsync(Server server) { var parameters = new DialogParameters { { x => x.Server, server } }; var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync("Delete Server", parameters); var result = await dialog.Result; if (!result.Canceled) { //In a real world scenario we would reload the data from the source here since we "removed" it in the dialog already. Guid.TryParse(result.Data.ToString(), out Guid deletedServer); Servers.RemoveAll(item => item.Id == deletedServer); } } //Pretend we are loading this data from a database or API public List Servers { get; } = new List { new Server{ Id = Guid.NewGuid(), Name = "Server1", Location = "Denmark", IpAddress = "193.254.123.1" }, new Server{ Id = Guid.NewGuid(), Name = "Server2", Location = "Sweden", IpAddress = "127.0.0.1" }, new Server{ Id = Guid.NewGuid(), Name = "Server3", Location = "Russia", IpAddress = "173.164.2.1" }, new Server{ Id = Guid.NewGuid(), Name = "Server4", Location = "Germany", IpAddress = "193.168.1.1" }, }; }

@code {
private string _licenseText;
    private bool _loading;

    [CascadingParameter]
    private IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; }

    [Inject]
    private HttpClient HttpClient { get; set; }

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        await base.OnInitializedAsync();
        _loading = true;
        var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor/master/LICENSE");
        _licenseText = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
        _loading = false;
    }

    private void Ok() => MudDialog.Close(DialogResult.Ok(true));
}

Examples.Code:
Change Title Toggle Close Button Toggle Full Width Toggle Header Close On Navigation Change Url
OK @code { [CascadingParameter] private IMudDialogInstance MudDialog { get; set; } [SupplyParameterFromQuery(Name = "example")] public int? QueryParameterExample { get; set; } protected override void OnParametersSet() { QueryParameterExample ??= 0; } private void Close() => MudDialog.Close(DialogResult.Ok(true)); private Task ChangeTitleAsync() => MudDialog.SetTitleAsync($"Current time is: {DateTime.Now}"); private Task ToggleCloseButtonAsync() { var options = MudDialog.Options with { CloseButton = !(MudDialog.Options.CloseButton ?? false) }; return MudDialog.SetOptionsAsync(options); } private Task ToggleFullWidthAsync() { var options = MudDialog.Options with { FullWidth = !(MudDialog.Options.FullWidth ?? true) }; return MudDialog.SetOptionsAsync(options); } private Task ToggleHeaderAsync() { var options = MudDialog.Options with { NoHeader = !(MudDialog.Options.NoHeader ?? false) }; return MudDialog.SetOptionsAsync(options); } private void ChangeUrl() { var uri = new Uri(NavigationManager.Uri); var query = HttpUtility.ParseQueryString(uri.Query); query["example"] = (QueryParameterExample + 1).ToString(); var newUri = $"{uri.GetLeftPart(UriPartial.Path)}?{query}"; NavigationManager.NavigateTo(newUri); } private Task CloseOnNavigationChangedAsync(bool? closeOnNavigation) { var options = MudDialog.Options with { CloseOnNavigation = closeOnNavigation }; return MudDialog.SetOptionsAsync(options); } }

@code {
private Task DeleteUserAsync()
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<DialogTemplateExample_Dialog>
        {
            { x => x.ContentText, "Do you really want to delete these records? This process cannot be undone." },
            { x => x.ButtonText, "Delete" },
            { x => x.Color, Color.Error }
        };

        var options = new DialogOptions() { CloseButton = true, MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall };

        return DialogService.ShowAsync<DialogTemplateExample_Dialog>("Delete", parameters, options);
    }

    private Task ConfirmAsync()
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<DialogTemplateExample_Dialog>
        {
            { x => x.ContentText, "Are you sure you want to remove thisguy@emailz.com from this account?" },
            { x => x.ButtonText, "Yes" },
            { x => x.Color, Color.Success }
        };

        return DialogService.ShowAsync<DialogTemplateExample_Dialog>("Confirm", parameters);
    }

    private Task DownloadAsync()
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<DialogTemplateExample_Dialog>
        {
            { x => x.ContentText, "Your computer seems very slow, click the download button to download free RAM." },
            { x => x.ButtonText, "Download" },
            { x => x.Color, Color.Info }
        };

        return DialogService.ShowAsync<DialogTemplateExample_Dialog>("Slow Computer Detected", parameters);
    }
}
Examples.Title: Template

            <MudRadio Color="Color.Primary" Value="@(Placement.Left)">Left</MudRadio>

        </MudRadioGroup>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="9" Class="d-flex justify-center align-center my-auto">
        <MudRadioGroup T="string">
            <MudRadio T="string" LabelPlacement="@Placement" Color="Color.Secondary">Content Placement</MudRadio>
        </MudRadioGroup>
    </MudItem>

</MudGrid>

Components.Name: MudDrawer
Components.Summary: Represents a navigation panel docked to the side of the page.

Parameters.Name: Fixed
Parameters.Description: Shows the drawer in the same position even if the page is scrolled.

Parameters.Name: Elevation
Parameters.Description: The size of the drop shadow.

Parameters.Name: Anchor
Parameters.Description: The edge of the container that the drawer will appear.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: The color of the drawer.

Parameters.Name: Variant
Parameters.Description: The display variant of this drawer.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this drawer.

Parameters.Name: Overlay
Parameters.Description: For responsive and temporary drawers, darkens the screen with an overlay when displaying this drawer.

Parameters.Name: OverlayAutoClose
Parameters.Description: Automatically closes the drawer when clicking on the overlay.

Parameters.Name: OpenMiniOnHover
Parameters.Description: For mini drawers, opens this drawer when the pointer hovers over it.

Parameters.Name: Breakpoint
Parameters.Description: The browser width at which responsive drawers are hidden.

Parameters.Name: Open
Parameters.Description: Displays this drawer.

Parameters.Name: OpenChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the <see cref="Open"/> value has changed.

Parameters.Name: Width
Parameters.Description: For non-fixed or temporary drawers, the width of this drawer.

Parameters.Name: MiniWidth
Parameters.Description: For mini drawers, the width of this drawer.

Parameters.Name: Height
Parameters.Description: The height of this drawer.

Parameters.Name: ClipMode
Parameters.Description: The position of this drawer when opened, relative to a <see cref="MudAppBar"/> when inside a <see cref="MudLayout"/>.

Events.Name: OpenChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when the <see cref="Open"/> value has changed.

Examples.Name: Breakpoint
Examples.RazorMarkup:
@layout IframeLayout
<MudLayout>
    <MudAppBar Elevation="1">
        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Menu" Color="Color.Inherit" Edge="Edge.Start" OnClick="@ToggleDrawer" />
        <MudSpacer />
        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Custom.Brands.GitHub" Color="Color.Inherit" Href="https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor" Target="_blank" />
    </MudAppBar>
    <MudDrawer @bind-Open="@_open" Breakpoint="@_breakpoint" Elevation="1" Variant="@DrawerVariant.Responsive">
        <MudDrawerHeader>
            <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">My App</MudText>
        </MudDrawerHeader>
        <MudNavMenu>
            <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Store</MudNavLink>
            <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Library</MudNavLink>
            <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Community</MudNavLink>
        </MudNavMenu>
    </MudDrawer>
    <MudMainContent Class="pt-16 px-16">
        <MudContainer Class="mt-6">
            <MudSelect Label="Select breakpoint" @bind-Value="_breakpoint">
                <MudSelectItem Value="@Breakpoint.Sm">Breakpoint.Sm</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="@Breakpoint.Md">Breakpoint.Md</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="@Breakpoint.Lg">Breakpoint.Lg</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="@Breakpoint.Xl">Breakpoint.Xl</MudSelectItem>
            </MudSelect>
        </MudContainer>
    </MudMainContent>
</MudLayout>

Examples.Name: Clipping
Examples.RazorMarkup:
@layout IframeLayout
<MudLayout>
    <MudAppBar Elevation="1" Dense="@_dense">
        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Menu" Color="Color.Inherit" Edge="Edge.Start" OnClick="@ToggleDrawer" />
        <MudSpacer />
        <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Custom.Brands.GitHub" Color="Color.Inherit" Href="https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor" Target="_blank" />
    </MudAppBar>
    <MudDrawer @bind-Open="@_open" ClipMode="_clipMode" Elevation="1" Variant="@DrawerVariant.Responsive">
        <MudDrawerHeader>
            <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">My App</MudText>
        </MudDrawerHeader>
        <MudNavMenu>
            <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Store</MudNavLink>
            <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Library</MudNavLink>
            <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Community</MudNavLink>
        </MudNavMenu>
    </MudDrawer>
    <MudMainContent Class="pt-16 px-16">
        <MudContainer Class="mt-6">
            <MudSelect Label="Select clip mode" @bind-Value="_clipMode">
                <MudSelectItem Value="@DrawerClipMode.Never">Not clipped (DrawerClipMode.Never)</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="@DrawerClipMode.Docked">Drawer is docked (DrawerClipMode.Docked)</MudSelectItem>
                <MudSelectItem Value="@DrawerClipMode.Always">Always (DrawerClipMode.Always)</MudSelectItem>
            </MudSelect>
            <MudSwitch @bind-Value="_dense" Label="Dense appbar" Color="Color.Primary" Style="width:100%;" />
        </MudContainer>
    </MudMainContent>
</MudLayout>

Examples.Code:
<MudButton Variant="Variant.Text" OnClick="@(() => OpenDrawer(Anchor.Start))">Start</MudButton>
<MudButton Variant="Variant.Text" OnClick="@(() => OpenDrawer(Anchor.End))">End</MudButton>
<MudButton Variant="Variant.Text" OnClick="@(() => OpenDrawer(Anchor.Top))">Top</MudButton>
<MudButton Variant="Variant.Text" OnClick="@(() => OpenDrawer(Anchor.Bottom))">Bottom</MudButton>

<MudDrawer @bind-Open="@_open" Width="@_width" Height="@_height" Anchor="@_anchor" Elevation="1" Variant="@DrawerVariant.Temporary">
    <MudDrawerHeader>
        <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">My App</MudText>
    </MudDrawerHeader>
    <MudNavMenu>
        <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Store</MudNavLink>
        <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Library</MudNavLink>
        <MudNavLink Match="NavLinkMatch.All">Community</MudNavLink>
    </MudNavMenu>
</MudDrawer>

@code {
private bool _open;
    private Anchor _anchor;
    private string _width, _height;

    private void OpenDrawer(Anchor anchor)
    {
        _open = true;
        _anchor = anchor;

        switch (anchor)
        {
            case Anchor.Start:
                _width = "300px";
                _height = "100%";
                break;
            case Anchor.End:
                _width = "400px";
                _height = "100%";
                break;
            case Anchor.Bottom:
                _width = "100%";
                _height = "200px";
                break;
            case Anchor.Top:
                _width = "100%";
                _height = "350px";
                break;
        }
    }
}

Components.Name: MudBreadcrumbs
Components.Summary: Represents a series of links used to show the user's current location.

Parameters.Name: Items
Parameters.Description: The list of items to display.

Parameters.Name: Separator
Parameters.Description: The separator shown between items.

Parameters.Name: SeparatorTemplate
Parameters.Description: The content shown between items.

Parameters.Name: ItemTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used to display items.

Parameters.Name: MaxItems
Parameters.Description: The maximum number of items to display.

Parameters.Name: ExpanderIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon to display when items are collapsed.

Examples.Name: Basic
Examples.RazorMarkup: <MudBreadcrumbs Items="_items"></MudBreadcrumbs>
Examples.Code:
<MudBreadcrumbs Items="_items"></MudBreadcrumbs>

@code {
private List<BreadcrumbItem> _items =
    [
        new("Home", href: "#"),
        new("Link 1", href: "#"),
        new("Link 2", href: null, disabled: true)
    ];
}

Components.Name: MudAutocomplete
Components.Summary: A text input for searching and selecting from a list of options. Unlike <see cref="MudSelect{T}"/>, it doesn't require the complete item list upfront and supports asynchronous search for database queries.
Components.Description: MudAutocomplete supports keyboard navigation.

Parameters.Name: InputClass
Parameters.Description: Input's classnames, separated by space.

Parameters.Name: PopoverClass
Parameters.Description: The CSS classes applied to the popover.

Parameters.Name: ListClass
Parameters.Description: The CSS classes applied to the internal list.

Parameters.Name: ListItemClass
Parameters.Description: The CSS classes applied to internal list items.

Parameters.Name: AnchorOrigin
Parameters.Description: The location where the popover will open from.

Parameters.Name: TransformOrigin
Parameters.Description: The transform origin point for the popover.

Parameters.Name: Dense
Parameters.Description: Uses compact padding.

Parameters.Name: OpenIcon
Parameters.Description: The "open" Autocomplete icon.

Parameters.Name: CloseIcon
Parameters.Description: The "close" Autocomplete icon.

Parameters.Name: MaxHeight
Parameters.Description: The maximum height, in pixels, of the Autocomplete when it is open.

Parameters.Name: ToStringFunc
Parameters.Description: The function used to get the display text for each item.

Parameters.Name: ShowProgressIndicator
Parameters.Description: Shows the progress indicator during searches.

Parameters.Name: ProgressIndicatorColor
Parameters.Description: The color of the progress indicator.

Parameters.Name: SearchFunc
Parameters.Description: The function used to search for items.

Parameters.Name: MaxItems
Parameters.Description: The maximum number of items to display.

Parameters.Name: MinCharacters
Parameters.Description: The minimum number of characters typed to initiate a search.

Parameters.Name: ResetValueOnEmptyText
Parameters.Description: Reset the selected value if the user deletes the text.

Parameters.Name: SelectOnActivation
Parameters.Description: Highlights the text when the component receives focus.

Parameters.Name: Strict
Parameters.Description: Selects items without resetting the <c>Value</c>.

Parameters.Name: DebounceInterval
Parameters.Description: The debounce interval, in milliseconds.

Parameters.Name: ItemTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used to display unselected items.

Parameters.Name: ItemSelectedTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used to display selected items.

Parameters.Name: ItemDisabledTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used to display disabled items.

Parameters.Name: MoreItemsTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used when the number of items returned by <see cref="SearchFunc"/> is more than the value of the <see cref="MaxItems"/> property.

Parameters.Name: NoItemsTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used when no items are returned by <see cref="SearchFunc"/>.

Parameters.Name: BeforeItemsTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template shown above the list of items, if <see cref="SearchFunc"/> returns items to display. Otherwise, the fragment is hidden.

Parameters.Name: AfterItemsTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template shown below the list of items, if <see cref="SearchFunc"/> returns items to display. Otherwise, the fragment is hidden.

Parameters.Name: ProgressIndicatorTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used for the progress indicator when <see cref="ShowProgressIndicator"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: ProgressIndicatorInPopoverTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used for the progress indicator inside the popover when <see cref="ShowProgressIndicator"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: Modal
Parameters.Description: Prevents interaction with background elements while this list is open.

Parameters.Name: RelativeWidth
Parameters.Description: Determines the width of this Popover dropdown in relation to the parent container.

Parameters.Name: CoerceText
Parameters.Description: Overrides the <c>Text</c> property when an item is selected.

Parameters.Name: CoerceValue
Parameters.Description: Sets the <c>Value</c> property even if no match is found by <see cref="SearchFunc"/>.

Parameters.Name: PopoverFixed
Parameters.Description: Displays the dropdown popover in a fixed position, even while scrolling.

Parameters.Name: ItemDisabledFunc
Parameters.Description: The function used to determine if an item should be disabled.

Parameters.Name: OpenChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the <see cref="Open"/> property has changed.

Parameters.Name: SelectValueOnTab
Parameters.Description: Updates the Value to the currently selected item when pressing the Tab key.

Parameters.Name: OpenOnFocus
Parameters.Description: Additionally, opens the list when focus is received on the input element; otherwise only opens on click.

Parameters.Name: Clearable
Parameters.Description: Displays the Clear icon button.

Parameters.Name: ClearIcon
Parameters.Description: Custom clear icon when <see cref="Clearable"/> is enabled.

Parameters.Name: OnClearButtonClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the Clear button has been clicked.

Parameters.Name: ReturnedItemsCountChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the number of items returned by <see cref="SearchFunc"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: LockScroll
Parameters.Description: Prevents scrolling while the dropdown is open.

Events.Name: OpenChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when the <see cref="Open"/> property has changed.

Events.Name: OnClearButtonClick
Events.Description: Occurs when the Clear button has been clicked.

Events.Name: ReturnedItemsCountChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when the number of items returned by <see cref="SearchFunc"/> has changed.

Methods.Name: SelectOptionAsync
Methods.Description: Changes the currently selected item to the specified value.

Methods.Name: ToggleMenuAsync
Methods.Description: Opens or closes the drop-down of items depending on whether it was closed or open.

Methods.Name: CloseMenuAsync
Methods.Description: Closes the drop-down of items.

Methods.Name: OpenMenuAsync
Methods.Description: Opens the drop-down of items, or refreshes the list if it is already open.

Methods.Name: ClearAsync
Methods.Description: Resets the Text and Value, and closes the drop-down if it is open.

Methods.Name: ScrollToListItemAsync
Methods.Description: Scrolls the list of items to the item at the specified index.

Methods.Name: FocusAsync
Methods.Description: Sets focus to this Autocomplete.

Methods.Name: BlurAsync
Methods.Description: Releases focus from this Autocomplete.

Methods.Name: SelectAsync
Methods.Description: Selects all the current text within the Autocomplete text box.

Methods.Name: SelectRangeAsync
Methods.Description: Selects a portion of the text within the Autocomplete text box.

Examples.Name: Cancellation Token
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudGrid>
	<MudItem xs="12">
		<MudAutocomplete T="string" Label="US States" @bind-Value="_state" SearchFunc="@Search" Variant="Variant.Outlined" ShowProgressIndicator="true" />
	</MudItem>
</MudGrid>
Examples.Code:
<MudGrid>
	<MudItem xs="12">
		<MudAutocomplete T="string" Label="US States" @bind-Value="_state" SearchFunc="@Search" Variant="Variant.Outlined" ShowProgressIndicator="true" />
	</MudItem>
</MudGrid>

@code {
[Inject] private HttpClient HttpClient { get; set; }
	private string _state;

	private async Task<IEnumerable<string>> Search(string value, CancellationToken token)
	{
		// Forward the CancellationToken to methods which supported, such as HttpClient and DbContext
		return await HttpClient.GetFromJsonAsync<IEnumerable<string>>($"webapi/AmericanStates/searchWithDelay/{value ?? string.Empty}", token);
	}
}

<MudGrid>

    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="6" md="4">
        <MudAutocomplete T="Element" Label="Periodic Table Element" @bind-Value="value2" 
                         SearchFunc="@Search" ToStringFunc="@(e=> e==null?null : $"{e.Name} ({e.Sign})")">
            <ItemTemplate Context="e">                          
                <MudText>
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.CheckBoxOutlineBlank" Class="mb-n1 mr-3"/>@($"{e.Name} ({e.Sign})")
                </MudText>
            </ItemTemplate>
            <ItemSelectedTemplate Context="e">                
                <MudText>
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.CheckBox" Class="mb-n1 mr-3"/>@($"{e.Name} ({e.Sign})")
                </MudText>
            </ItemSelectedTemplate>
        </MudAutocomplete>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="6" md="4">
        <MudAutocomplete T="Element" Label="Periodic Table Element" @bind-Value="value3"
                   SearchFunc="@Search" ItemDisabledFunc="@((Element e) => (e.Name.Contains("H")))" ToStringFunc="@(e=> e==null?null : $"{e.Name} ({e.Sign})")">
            <ItemDisabledTemplate>
                <MudText>Not available: @context.ToString()</MudText>

        </MudAutocomplete>

        <MudText Class="mb-n3" Typo="Typo.body2">

                             Margin="_margin"

        <MudSwitch @bind-Value="_helperTextOnFocus" Label="HelperTextOnFocus" Color="Color.Primary" />

@code {
private string _value;
    private Margin _margin;
    private bool _dense;
    private bool _disabled;
    private bool _readonly;
    private bool _placeholder;
    private bool _helperText;
    private bool _helperTextOnFocus;
    private bool _clearable;
    private bool _modal;

    private string[] _states =
    {
        "Alabama", "Alaska", "Arizona", "Arkansas", "California",
        "Colorado", "Connecticut", "Delaware", "Florida", "Georgia",
        "Hawaii", "Idaho", "Illinois", "Indiana", "Iowa", "Kansas",
        "Kentucky", "Louisiana", "Maine", "Maryland", "Massachusetts",
        "Michigan", "Minnesota", "Mississippi", "Missouri", "Montana",
        "Nebraska", "Nevada", "New Hampshire", "New Jersey", "New Mexico",
        "New York", "North Carolina", "North Dakota", "Ohio", "Oklahoma",
        "Oregon", "Pennsylvania", "Rhode Island", "South Carolina", "South Dakota",
        "Tennessee", "Texas", "Utah", "Vermont", "Virginia",
        "Washington", "West Virginia", "Wisconsin", "Wyoming"
    };

    private async Task<IEnumerable<string>> Search(string value, CancellationToken token)
    {
        // In real life use an asynchronous function for fetching data from an api.
        await Task.Delay(5, token);

        // if text is null or empty, show complete list
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
        {
            return _states;
        }

        return _states.Where(x => x.Contains(value, StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase));
    }
}

@code {
public Color SelectedColor { get; set; } = Color.Default;

    private string value1;
    private string value2;
    private string value3;

    private string[] states =
    {
        "Alabama", "Alaska", "American Samoa", "Arizona",
        "Arkansas", "California", "Colorado", "Connecticut",
        "Delaware", "District of Columbia", "Federated States of Micronesia",
        "Florida", "Georgia", "Guam", "Hawaii", "Idaho",
        "Illinois", "Indiana", "Iowa", "Kansas", "Kentucky",
        "Louisiana", "Maine", "Marshall Islands", "Maryland",
        "Massachusetts", "Michigan", "Minnesota", "Mississippi",
        "Missouri", "Montana", "Nebraska", "Nevada",
        "New Hampshire", "New Jersey", "New Mexico", "New York",
        "North Carolina", "North Dakota", "Northern Mariana Islands", "Ohio",
        "Oklahoma", "Oregon", "Palau", "Pennsylvania", "Puerto Rico",
        "Rhode Island", "South Carolina", "South Dakota", "Tennessee",
        "Texas", "Utah", "Vermont", "Virgin Island", "Virginia",
        "Washington", "West Virginia", "Wisconsin", "Wyoming",
    };

    private async Task<IEnumerable<string>> Search1(string value, CancellationToken token)
    {
        // In real life use an asynchronous function for fetching data from an api.
        await Task.Delay(1000, token);

        // if text is null or empty, show complete list
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
            return states;
        return states.Where(x => x.Contains(value, StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase));
    }

    public void OnColorSelected(Color value)
    {
        SelectedColor = value;
    }
}

        "Delaware", "District of Columbia", "Federated States of Micronesia",

        "Texas", "Utah", "Vermont", "Virgin Island", "Virginia",
        "Washington", "West Virginia", "Wisconsin", "Wyoming",
    };

    private async Task<IEnumerable<string>> Search1(string value, CancellationToken token)
    {
        // In real life use an asynchronous function for fetching data from an api.
        await Task.Delay(5, token);

        // if text is null or empty, show complete list
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
            return states;
        return states.Where(x => x.Contains(value, StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase));

    private async Task<IEnumerable<string>> Search2(string value, CancellationToken token)

        await Task.Delay(5, token);

        // if text is null or empty, don't return values (drop-down will not open)
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
            return new string[0];
        return states.Where(x => x.Contains(value, StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase));
    }
}

Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudGrid>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="6" md="4">
        <EditForm EditContext="editContext1">
        <DataAnnotationsValidator />
            <MudAutocomplete Label="US States" @bind-Value="choice1.State" Required="true"
             SearchFunc="@SearchAsync" Immediate="true" CoerceValue="@coerceValue" ResetValueOnEmptyText="true"
             AdornmentIcon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Search" AdornmentColor="Color.Primary"
             For="@(() => choice1.State)"/>
            <MudButton ButtonType="ButtonType.Button" Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary" 
             Class="ml-auto mt-3 mb-3" OnClick="@(()=>success1=editContext1.Validate())">Validate</MudButton>
                   @if (success1)
                   {
                       <MudText Color="Color.Success">Success</MudText>
                   }
        </EditForm>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="6" md="4">
        <EditForm EditContext="editContext2">
        <DataAnnotationsValidator />
            <MudAutocomplete Label="US States" @bind-Value="choice2.State" Required="true"
             SearchFunc="@SearchAsync" Immediate="true" CoerceValue="@coerceValue" ResetValueOnEmptyText="true"
             OpenIcon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Search" AdornmentColor="Color.Secondary"
             Validation="@(new Func<string, IEnumerable<string>>(Validate))" />
            <MudButton ButtonType="ButtonType.Button" Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary" 
                       Class="ml-auto mt-3 mb-3" OnClick="@(()=>success2=editContext2.Validate())">Validate</MudButton>
                   @if (success2)
                   {
                       <MudText Color="Color.Success">Success</MudText>
                   }
        </EditForm>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="6" md="4">
        <MudForm @ref="form">
            <MudAutocomplete T="string" Label="US States" @bind-Value="choice3.State" Required="true"
             SearchFunc="@SearchAsync" Immediate="true" CoerceValue="@coerceValue" ResetValueOnEmptyText="true"
             CloseIcon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Search" AdornmentColor="Color.Tertiary"
             Validation="@(new Func<string, IEnumerable<string>>(Validate))" />
            <MudButton Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary" Class="ml-auto mt-3 mb-3" 
             OnClick="@(()=>form.ValidateAsync())">Validate</MudButton>
                    @if (form.IsTouched && form.IsValid)
                    {
                        <MudText Color="Color.Success">Success</MudText>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <MudText>IsTouched: @form.IsTouched, IsValid: @form.IsValid</MudText>
                    }
        </MudForm>
	</MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="12">
        <MudText Class="mb-n3" Typo="Typo.body2">
            <MudChip T="string">@(choice1.State ?? "Not selected")</MudChip><MudChip T="string">@(choice2.State ?? "Not selected")</MudChip><MudChip T="string">@(choice3.State ?? "Not selected")</MudChip>
        </MudText>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" md="12" class="flex-column">
        <MudSwitch @bind-Value="coerceValue" Color="Color.Tertiary">Coerce Value to Text (if not found)</MudSwitch>
    </MudItem>
</MudGrid>
