Examples.Name: With List Multiple
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudPaper Elevation="0">
    <MudList T="string">
        <MudListSubheader>
            <MudTextField @bind-Value="searchTerm" AdornmentIcon="@Icons.Material.Filled.People"
                          Adornment="Adornment.End" Immediate="true" Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                          Label="Names to search"/>
        </MudListSubheader>

        @{
            string[] searchTerms = searchTerm.Split(split);
            for (int i = 0; i < searchTerms.Length; i++)
                searchTerms[i] = searchTerms[i].Trim();
        }
        @foreach (var name in names)
        {
            <MudListItem @key="name" Icon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Person">
                <MudHighlighter Text="@name" HighlightedTexts="@searchTerms" />
            </MudListItem>
        }
    </MudList>
</MudPaper>

Examples.Name: With Table
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudTable Items="@GetElements()">
    <ToolBarContent>
        <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">Periodic Elements</MudText>
        <MudSpacer />
        <MudTextField @bind-Value="_searchTerm" Placeholder="Search" Adornment="Adornment.End" AdornmentIcon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Search" IconSize="Size.Medium" Class="mt-0" Immediate="true"></MudTextField>
    </ToolBarContent>

    <HeaderContent>
        <MudTh>Name</MudTh>
    </HeaderContent>

    <RowTemplate>
        <MudTd DataLabel="Name">
            <MudHighlighter Text="@context.Name" HighlightedText="@_searchTerm" />
        </MudTd>
    </RowTemplate>
</MudTable>
Examples.Code:
<MudTable Items="@GetElements()">
    <ToolBarContent>
        <MudText Typo="Typo.h6">Periodic Elements</MudText>
        <MudSpacer />
        <MudTextField @bind-Value="_searchTerm" Placeholder="Search" Adornment="Adornment.End" AdornmentIcon="@Icons.Material.Filled.Search" IconSize="Size.Medium" Class="mt-0" Immediate="true"></MudTextField>
    </ToolBarContent>

    <HeaderContent>
        <MudTh>Name</MudTh>
    </HeaderContent>

    <RowTemplate>
        <MudTd DataLabel="Name">
            <MudHighlighter Text="@context.Name" HighlightedText="@_searchTerm" />
        </MudTd>
    </RowTemplate>
</MudTable>

@code {
private string _searchTerm = "H";
    private IEnumerable<Element> _elements = new List<Element>();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _elements = await httpClient.GetFromJsonAsync<List<Element>>("webapi/periodictable");
    }

    private IEnumerable<Element> GetElements() => _elements.Where(e => e.Name.Contains(_searchTerm));
}

Components.Name: MudFabMenu
Components.Summary: A menu appearing from a <see cref="MudFab"/> that displays a list of items.

Parameters.Name: ButtonClass
Parameters.Description: The CSS classes applied to the menu button.

Parameters.Name: ButtonStyle
Parameters.Description: The CSS style applied to the menu button.

Parameters.Name: MenuClass
Parameters.Description: The CSS classes applied to the item list.

Parameters.Name: MenuStyle
Parameters.Description: The CSS style applied to the item list.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The <see cref="MudFabMenuItem" /> components within this menu.

Parameters.Name: Open
Parameters.Description: Whether this menu is open and the menu items are visible.

Parameters.Name: OpenChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Open"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: Fixed
Parameters.Description: Sets the menu to a fixed position. Use <see cref="Anchor"/> to specify the position.

Parameters.Name: Direction
Parameters.Description: The direction in which the menu should open.

Parameters.Name: Anchor
Parameters.Description: The anchor position of the menu when <see cref="Fixed"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: UseCloseIcon
Parameters.Description: Replaces the set icon with a close icon when the menu is open.

Parameters.Name: DampenItemsBackgroundColor
Parameters.Description: Dampens the background color of the menu items when set to true to increase the contrast between the menu FAB and the menu items to archive a similar effect as described in the Material Design guidelines.

Parameters.Name: AlignItems
Parameters.Description: The alignment of the menu items in respect to the menu button.

Parameters.Name: OpenOnMouseHover
Parameters.Description: Opens the menu on mouse hover.

Parameters.Name: CloseOnMenuItemClicked
Parameters.Description: Closes the menu when a menu item is clicked.

Events.Name: OpenChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Open"/> has changed.

Components.Name: MudField
Components.Summary: A component similar to <see cref="MudTextField{T}"/> which supports custom content.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this field.

Parameters.Name: Margin
Parameters.Description: The vertical spacing for this field.

Parameters.Name: Typo
Parameters.Description: Typography for the field text.

Parameters.Name: Error
Parameters.Description: Displays the error in <see cref="ErrorText"/>.

Parameters.Name: ErrorText
Parameters.Description: A description of this field's error that is displayed under the field when <see cref="Error"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: HelperText
Parameters.Description: The text displayed below the text field.

Parameters.Name: FullWidth
Parameters.Description: Sets the width of the field to the width of the container.

Parameters.Name: Label
Parameters.Description: The label for this input.

Parameters.Name: Variant
Parameters.Description: The display variant of the field.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Prevents the user from interacting with this field.

Parameters.Name: AdornmentIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon displayed for the adornment.

Parameters.Name: AdornmentText
Parameters.Description: The text displayed for the adornment.

Parameters.Name: Adornment
Parameters.Description: The location of the adornment icon or text.

Parameters.Name: AdornmentColor
Parameters.Description: The color of <see cref="AdornmentText"/> or <see cref="AdornmentIcon"/>.

Parameters.Name: AdornmentAriaLabel
Parameters.Description: The <c>aria-label</c> for the adornment.

Parameters.Name: IconSize
Parameters.Description: The size of the icon.

Parameters.Name: OnAdornmentClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the adornment icon (but not the text) has been clicked.

Parameters.Name: InnerPadding
Parameters.Description: Displays padding for the content within this field.

Parameters.Name: Underline
Parameters.Description: Displays an underline for this field.

Parameters.Name: ShrinkLabel

Components.Name: MudInput
Components.Summary: A component for collecting an input value.

Parameters.Name: InputType
Parameters.Description: The type of input collected by this component.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this input component.

Parameters.Name: OnIncrement
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the <c>Up</c> arrow button is clicked.

Parameters.Name: OnDecrement
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the <c>Down</c> arrow button is clicked.

Parameters.Name: HideSpinButtons
Parameters.Description: For <see cref="MudNumericField{T}"/>, hides the spin buttons.

Parameters.Name: Clearable
Parameters.Description: Shows a button to clear this input's value.

Parameters.Name: OnClearButtonClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the clear button is clicked.

Parameters.Name: OnMouseWheel
Parameters.Description: Occurs when a mouse wheel event is raised.

Parameters.Name: ClearIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon to display when <see cref="Clearable"/> is <c>true</c>.

Parameters.Name: NumericUpIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon to display for the <c>Up</c> arrow button.

Parameters.Name: NumericDownIcon
Parameters.Description: The icon to display for the <c>Down</c> arrow button.

Parameters.Name: Sizing
Parameters.Description: Defines the resizing behavior of this input.

Parameters.Name: MaxLines
Parameters.Description: The maximum vertical lines to display when <see cref="Sizing"/> is <see cref="InputSizing.Auto"/>.

Events.Name: OnIncrement
Events.Description: Occurs when the <c>Up</c> arrow button is clicked.

Events.Name: OnDecrement
Events.Description: Occurs when the <c>Down</c> arrow button is clicked.

Events.Name: OnClearButtonClick
Events.Description: Occurs when the clear button is clicked.

Events.Name: OnMouseWheel
Events.Description: Occurs when a mouse wheel event is raised.

Methods.Name: SetText
Methods.Description: Set the <see cref="MudBaseInput{T}.Text"/> to the specified value.

Components.Name: MudProgressCircular
Components.Summary: Informs users about the status of ongoing processes, such as loading an app, submitting a form, or saving updates. Shows either the length of a process or unspecified wait time.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: The color of this component.

Parameters.Name: Size
Parameters.Description: The size of this component.

Parameters.Name: Indeterminate
Parameters.Description: Displays a constant animation without any value.

Parameters.Name: Rounded
Parameters.Description: Displays a rounded border.

Parameters.Name: Min
Parameters.Description: The lowest possible value.

Parameters.Name: Max
Parameters.Description: The highest possible value.

Parameters.Name: Value
Parameters.Description: The current progress amount.

Parameters.Name: StrokeWidth
Parameters.Description: The thickness of the circle.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: RenderFragment for rendering custom content

Components.Name: MudTablePager
Components.Summary: A component which changes pages and page size for a <see cref="MudTable{T}"/>.

Parameters.Name: RightToLeft

Parameters.Name: Context
Parameters.Description: The current state of the <see cref="MudTable{T}"/> containing this pager.

Parameters.Name: HideRowsPerPage

Parameters.Name: HidePageNumber
Parameters.Description: Hides the current page number.

Parameters.Name: HidePagination

Parameters.Name: HorizontalAlignment

Parameters.Name: PageSizeOptions

Parameters.Name: InfoFormat

Components.Name: MudForm
Components.Summary: Collects and validates user input, monitoring and validating every input derived from MudFormComponent within it.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The content within this form.

Parameters.Name: IsValid
Parameters.Description: Whether all inputs and child forms passed validation.

Parameters.Name: IsTouched
Parameters.Description: Whether any input's value has changed.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Prevents the user from interacting with this form.

Parameters.Name: ReadOnly
Parameters.Description: Prevents the user from changing any inputs.

Parameters.Name: ValidationDelay
Parameters.Description: The delay, in milliseconds, before performing validation.

Parameters.Name: SuppressRenderingOnValidation
Parameters.Description: Prevents child components from rendering when <see cref="IsValid"/> changes.

Parameters.Name: SuppressImplicitSubmission
Parameters.Description: Prevents this form from being submitted when <c>Enter</c> is pressed.

Parameters.Name: Spacing
Parameters.Description: The amount of spacing between input components, in increments of <c>4px</c>.

Parameters.Name: IsValidChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="IsValid"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: IsTouchedChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="IsTouched"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: FieldChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when an <see cref="IFormComponent"/> within this form has changed.

Parameters.Name: OnEnterPressed
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <c>Enter</c> is pressed on any child input of this form.

Parameters.Name: Validation
Parameters.Description: The default function or attribute used to validate form components which cannot validate themselves.

Parameters.Name: OverrideFieldValidation
Parameters.Description: Overrides input validation with the function or attribute in <see cref="Validation"/>.

Parameters.Name: Errors
Parameters.Description: The validation errors for inputs within this form.

Parameters.Name: ErrorsChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Errors"/> has changed.

Parameters.Name: Model
Parameters.Description: The model populated by this form.

Events.Name: IsValidChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="IsValid"/> has changed.

Events.Name: IsTouchedChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="IsTouched"/> has changed.

Events.Name: FieldChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when an <see cref="IFormComponent"/> within this form has changed.

Events.Name: OnEnterPressed
Events.Description: Occurs when <c>Enter</c> is pressed on any child input of this form.

Events.Name: ErrorsChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Errors"/> has changed.

Methods.Name: Validate
Methods.Description: Forces a validation of all form controls (including in child forms).

Methods.Name: ValidateAsync
Methods.Description: Forces a validation of all form controls (including in child forms).

Methods.Name: ResetAsync
Methods.Description: Resets all form controls and resets their validation state.

Methods.Name: ResetValidationAsync
Methods.Description: Resets the validation state of all form controls.

Methods.Name: ResetTouched
Methods.Description: Marks all form input components as unchanged.

Examples.Name: Edit Form
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<EditForm Model="@model" OnValidSubmit="OnValidSubmit">
<DataAnnotationsValidator/>
<MudGrid>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="7">
        <MudCard>
            <MudCardContent>
                <MudTextField Label="First name" HelperText="Max. 8 characters"
                              @bind-Value="model.Username" For="@(() => model.Username)"/>
                <MudTextField Label="Email" Class="mt-3"
                              @bind-Value="model.Email" For="@(() => model.Email)"/>
                <MudTextField Label="Password" HelperText="Choose a strong password" Class="mt-3"
                              @bind-Value="model.Password" For="@(() => model.Password)" InputType="InputType.Password"/>
                <MudTextField Label="Password" HelperText="Repeat the password" Class="mt-3"
                              @bind-Value="model.Password2" For="@(() => model.Password2)" InputType="InputType.Password"/>
            </MudCardContent>
            <MudCardActions>
                <MudButton ButtonType="ButtonType.Submit" Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary" Class="ml-auto">Register</MudButton>
            </MudCardActions>
        </MudCard>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12" sm="5">
        <MudPaper Class="pa-4 mud-height-full">
            <MudText Typo="Typo.subtitle2">Validation Summary</MudText>
            @if (success)
            {
                <MudText Color="Color.Success">Success</MudText>
            }
            else
            {
                <MudText Color="@Color.Error">
                    <ValidationSummary />
                </MudText>
            }
        </MudPaper>
    </MudItem>
    <MudItem xs="12">
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Align="Align.Center">
            Fill out the form correctly to see the success message.
        </MudText>
    </MudItem>
</MudGrid>
</EditForm>

@code {
RegisterAccountForm model = new RegisterAccountForm();
    bool success;

    public class RegisterAccountForm
    {
        [Required]
        [StringLength(8, ErrorMessage = "Name length can't be more than 8.")]
        public string Username { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [EmailAddress]
        public string Email { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [StringLength(30, ErrorMessage = "Password must be at least 8 characters long.", MinimumLength = 8)]
        public string Password { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [Compare(nameof(Password))]
        public string Password2 { get; set; }

    }

    private void OnValidSubmit(EditContext context)
    {
        success = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }
}

Examples.Name: Fluent Validation Complex
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudCard>
	<MudForm Model="@model" @ref="@form" Validation="@(orderValidator.ValidateValue)" ValidationDelay="0">
		<MudCardContent>
				<MudTextField @bind-Value="model.Name"                              
							  For="@(() => model.Name)"
							  Immediate="true"
							  Label="Name" />

				<MudTextField @bind-Value="model.Email"
							  For="@(() => model.Email)"
							  Immediate="true"
							  Label="Email" />

				<MudTextField @bind-Value="model.CCNumber"
							  For="@(() => model.CCNumber)"
							  Immediate="true"
							  Label="Credit card nr" />

				<MudTextField @bind-Value="model.Address.Address"
							  For="@(() => model.Address.Address)"
							  Immediate="true"
							  Label="Address" />

				<MudTextField @bind-Value="model.Address.City"
							  For="@(() => model.Address.City)"
							  Immediate="true"
							  Label="City" />

				<MudTextField @bind-Value="model.Address.Country"
							  For="@(() => model.Address.Country)"
							  Immediate="true"
							  Label="Country" />
        </MudCardContent>
		<MudCardContent Class="pa-0">

			<MudTable Items="@model.OrderDetails" Hover="true" Breakpoint="Breakpoint.None" Dense="@true" Elevation="0">
				<HeaderContent>
					<MudTh>Description</MudTh>
					<MudTh>Offer</MudTh>
				</HeaderContent>
				<RowTemplate>
					<MudTd DataLabel="Description">
						<MudForm Model="@context" Validation=@(orderDetailsValidator.ValidateValue)>
  							<MudTextField Label="Enter Description" 
                              @bind-Value="context.Description" 
                              For="(() => context.Description)" />
  						</MudForm>
					</MudTd>
					<MudTd DataLabel="Offer">
						<MudForm Model="@context">
  							<MudNumericField Label="Enter Offer" 
                                               @bind-Value="context.Offer" 
                                               Validation=@(orderDetailsValidator.ValidateValue)
                                               For="(() => context.Offer)" />
  						</MudForm>
					</MudTd>
				</RowTemplate>
			</MudTable>

		</MudCardContent>
	</MudForm>
    <MudCardActions>
        <MudButton Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary" Class="ml-auto" OnClick="@(async () => await Submit())">Order</MudButton>
    </MudCardActions>
</MudCard>

@code {
[Inject] ISnackbar Snackbar { get; set; }

    MudForm form;

    OrderModelFluentValidator orderValidator = new OrderModelFluentValidator();

	OrderDetailsModelFluentValidator orderDetailsValidator = new OrderDetailsModelFluentValidator();

    OrderModel model = new OrderModel();

    public class OrderModel
    {
        public string Name { get; set; }
        public string Email { get; set; }
        public string CCNumber { get; set; } = "4012 8888 8888 1881";
        public AddressModel Address { get; set; } = new AddressModel();
		public List<OrderDetailsModel> OrderDetails = new List<OrderDetailsModel>()
		{
			new OrderDetailsModel()
				{
					Description = "Perform Work order 1",
					Offer = 100
				},
			new OrderDetailsModel()
		};
	}

    public class AddressModel
    {
        public string Address { get; set; }
        public string City { get; set; }
        public string Country { get; set; }
    }

	public class OrderDetailsModel
	{
		public string Description { get; set; }
		public decimal Offer { get; set; }
	}

    private async Task Submit()
    {
        await form.ValidateAsync();

        if (form.IsValid)
        {
            Snackbar.Add("Submitted!");
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// A standard AbstractValidator which contains multiple rules and can be shared with the back end API
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="OrderModel"></typeparam>
    public class OrderModelFluentValidator : AbstractValidator<OrderModel>
    {
        public OrderModelFluentValidator()
        {
            RuleFor(x => x.Name)
                .NotEmpty()
                .Length(1,100);

            RuleFor(x => x.Email)
                .Cascade(CascadeMode.Stop)
                .NotEmpty()
                .EmailAddress()
                .MustAsync(async (value, cancellationToken) => await IsUniqueAsync(value));

            RuleFor(x => x.CCNumber)
                .NotEmpty()
                .Length(1,100)
                .CreditCard();

            RuleFor(x => x.Address.Address)
                .NotEmpty()
                .Length(1,100);

            RuleFor(x => x.Address.City)
                .NotEmpty()
                .Length(1,100);

            RuleFor(x => x.Address.Country)
                .NotEmpty()
                .Length(1,100);

			RuleForEach(x => x.OrderDetails)
				.SetValidator(new OrderDetailsModelFluentValidator());
		}

        private async Task<bool> IsUniqueAsync(string email)
        {
            // Simulates a long running http call
            await Task.Delay(2000);
            return email.ToLower() != "test@test.com";
        }

        public Func<object, string, Task<IEnumerable<string>>> ValidateValue => async (model, propertyName) =>
        {
            var result = await ValidateAsync(ValidationContext<OrderModel>.CreateWithOptions((OrderModel)model, x => x.IncludeProperties(propertyName)));
            if (result.IsValid)
                return Array.Empty<string>();
            return result.Errors.Select(e => e.ErrorMessage);
        };
    }

	/// <summary>
    /// A standard AbstractValidator for the Collection Object
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="OrderDetailsModel"></typeparam>
    public class OrderDetailsModelFluentValidator : AbstractValidator<OrderDetailsModel>
    {
        public OrderDetailsModelFluentValidator()
        {
            RuleFor(x => x.Description)
                .NotEmpty()
                .Length(1,100);

			RuleFor(x => x.Offer)
				.GreaterThan(0)
				.LessThan(999);
        }

        public Func<object, string, Task<IEnumerable<string>>> ValidateValue => async (model, propertyName) =>
        {
            var result = await ValidateAsync(ValidationContext<OrderDetailsModel>.CreateWithOptions((OrderDetailsModel)model, x => x.IncludeProperties(propertyName)));
            if (result.IsValid)
                return Array.Empty<string>();
            return result.Errors.Select(e => e.ErrorMessage);
        };
    }
}

@code {
// This is a valid Visa test card number
    string creditCardNr = "4012 8888 8888 1881";

    // The validation rules (overkill, I know, but very fluent):
    FluentValueValidator<string> ccValidator = new FluentValueValidator<string>(x => x
        .NotEmpty()
        .Length(1,100)
        .CreditCard());

    /// <summary>
    /// A glue class to make it easy to define validation rules for single values using FluentValidation
    /// You can reuse this class for all your fields, like for the credit card rules above.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="T"></typeparam>
    public class FluentValueValidator<T> : AbstractValidator<T>
    {
        public FluentValueValidator(Action<IRuleBuilderInitial<T, T>> rule)
        {
            rule(RuleFor(x => x));
        }

        private IEnumerable<string> ValidateValue(T arg)
        {
            var result = Validate(arg);
            if (result.IsValid)
                return new string[0];
            return result.Errors.Select(e => e.ErrorMessage);
        }

        public Func<T, IEnumerable<string>> Validation => ValidateValue;
    }
}

Components.Name: MudHotkey
Components.Summary: Allows registering a hotkey.

Parameters.Name: ChildContent
Parameters.Description: The optional content to be displayed when the hotkey is pressed.

Parameters.Name: Key
Parameters.Description: The hotkey to register.

Parameters.Name: KeyModifiers
Parameters.Description: The modifiers the user has to press together with <see cref="Key"/> to trigger the hotkey.

Parameters.Name: OnHotkeyPressed
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Key"/> and <see cref="KeyModifiers"/> are pressed.

Parameters.Name: HideChildContentOnRepress
Parameters.Description: Whether to hide the child content when the hotkey is pressed again, allowing for a toggle behavior.

Parameters.Name: PreventEventPropagation
Parameters.Description: Whether to prevent the key press event from propagating.

Parameters.Name: Disabled
Parameters.Description: Ignores the hotkey when set to true.

Events.Name: OnHotkeyPressed
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Key"/> and <see cref="KeyModifiers"/> are pressed.

Examples.Name: Example Child Content
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudStack>
    <MudStack Row="true">
        <MudSelect Label="Key" @bind-Value="@_selectedKey" Style="width: 200px;">
            @foreach (var key in Enum.GetValues<JsKey>())
            {
                <MudSelectItem Value="@key">@Enum.GetName(typeof(JsKey), key)</MudSelectItem>
            }
        </MudSelect>
        <MudSelect T="JsKeyModifier" Label="Modifier" @bind-SelectedValues="@_selectedKeyModifiers" MultiSelection="true" Style="min-width: 200px;">
            @foreach (var keyModifier in Enum.GetValues<JsKeyModifier>())
            {
                <MudSelectItem T="JsKeyModifier" Value="@keyModifier">@Enum.GetName(typeof(JsKeyModifier), keyModifier)</MudSelectItem>
            }
        </MudSelect>
        <MudStack Spacing="0">
            <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="@_hideChildContentOnRepress" Label="Hide child content on repress" Class="mt-n3"/>
            <MudCheckBox @bind-Value="@_disabled" Label="Disabled" Class="mt-n5"/>
        </MudStack>
    </MudStack>
    <MudAlert Severity="Severity.Info">Press the selected key-combination to toggle the button.</MudAlert>
    <MudHotkey Key="@_selectedKey" KeyModifiers="@_selectedKeyModifiers" HideChildContentOnRepress="@_hideChildContentOnRepress" Disabled="@_disabled">
        <MudButton EndIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.EmojiEmotions" Color="Color.Primary" Variant="Variant.Filled">
            I'm a button
        </MudButton>
    </MudHotkey>
</MudStack>

Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudDatePicker Label="Current UI Culture" @bind-Date="_date" />
<MudDatePicker Label="Persian" @bind-Date="_date" Culture="@GetPersianCulture()" TitleDateFormat="dddd, dd MMMM"/>
<MudDatePicker Label="Chinese" @bind-Date="_date" Culture="@CultureInfo.GetCultureInfo("zh-Hans")" TitleDateFormat="dddd, dd MMMM"/>
Examples.Code:
<MudDatePicker Label="Current UI Culture" @bind-Date="_date" />
<MudDatePicker Label="Persian" @bind-Date="_date" Culture="@GetPersianCulture()" TitleDateFormat="dddd, dd MMMM"/>
<MudDatePicker Label="Chinese" @bind-Date="_date" Culture="@CultureInfo.GetCultureInfo("zh-Hans")" TitleDateFormat="dddd, dd MMMM"/>

@code {
private DateTime? _date = new DateTime(2021, 02, 14); // 1399-11-26 in Persian calendar

    public CultureInfo GetPersianCulture()
    {
        var culture = new CultureInfo("fa-IR");
        DateTimeFormatInfo formatInfo = culture.DateTimeFormat;
        formatInfo.AbbreviatedDayNames = new[] { "ی", "د", "س", "چ", "پ", "ج", "ش" };
        formatInfo.DayNames = new[] { "یکشنبه", "دوشنبه", "سه شنبه", "چهار شنبه", "پنجشنبه", "جمعه", "شنبه" };
        var monthNames = new[]
        {
            "فروردین", "اردیبهشت", "خرداد", "تیر", "مرداد", "شهریور", "مهر", "آبان", "آذر", "دی", "بهمن",
            "اسفند",
            "",
        };
        formatInfo.AbbreviatedMonthNames =
            formatInfo.MonthNames =
                formatInfo.MonthGenitiveNames = formatInfo.AbbreviatedMonthGenitiveNames = monthNames;
        formatInfo.AMDesignator = "ق.ظ";
        formatInfo.PMDesignator = "ب.ظ";
        formatInfo.ShortDatePattern = "yyyy/MM/dd";
        formatInfo.LongDatePattern = "dddd, dd MMMM,yyyy";
        formatInfo.FirstDayOfWeek = DayOfWeek.Saturday;
        Calendar cal = new PersianCalendar();
        FieldInfo fieldInfo = culture.GetType().GetField("calendar", BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);
        if (fieldInfo != null)
            fieldInfo.SetValue(culture, cal);
        FieldInfo info = formatInfo.GetType().GetField("calendar", BindingFlags.NonPublic | BindingFlags.Instance);
        if (info != null)
            info.SetValue(formatInfo, cal);
        culture.NumberFormat.NumberDecimalSeparator = "/";
        culture.NumberFormat.DigitSubstitution = DigitShapes.NativeNational;
        culture.NumberFormat.NumberNegativePattern = 0;
        return culture;
    }
}
Examples.Title: Internationalization

Examples.Name: Text Parse
Examples.RazorMarkup: <MudDatePicker Label="Flexible Date" Editable="true" Date="_date" ImmediateText="true" Placeholder="day.month.year" DateFormat="@_dateFormat" TextChanged="DatePickerTextChanged" HelperText="@_bound" Clearable="true" />
Examples.Code:
<MudDatePicker Label="Flexible Date" Editable="true" Date="_date" ImmediateText="true" Placeholder="day.month.year" DateFormat="@_dateFormat" TextChanged="DatePickerTextChanged" HelperText="@_bound" Clearable="true" />

@code {
private DateTime? _date = null;
    private string _dateFormat = "dd.MM.yyyy";
    private string _bound = "not set";

    private void DatePickerTextChanged(string value)
    {
        if (value == null || value.Length < 6)
        {
            _date = null;
        }
        else
        {
            string[] formats = { "ddMMyy", "dd.MM.yyyy", "dd.M.yyyy", "d.MM.yyyy", "d.M.yyyy", "dd.MM.yy", "dd.M.yy", "d.MM.yy", "d.M.yy" };
            if (DateTime.TryParseExact(value, formats, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, out DateTime validDate))
            {
                _date = validDate;
            }
            else
            {
                _date = null;
            }
        }

        if (_date.HasValue)
        {
            _bound = _date.Value.ToString(_dateFormat); 
        }
        else
        {
            _bound = "not set";
        }
    }
}

Examples.Name: For Keyboard Navigation
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudStack Justify="@Justify.Center"
          Class="mud-width-full">
    <MudChipSet T="string"
                AllClosable="@true"
                CheckMark="@true"
                SelectionMode="@SelectionMode.MultiSelection"
                OnClose="@OnChipClosed">
        @for (var i = 0; i < _chips.Count; i++)
        {
            var localIndex = i;
            <MudChip Value="@_chips[localIndex]"
                     Color="@((Color)(localIndex % _numberOfColors))" />
        }
    </MudChipSet>
    <MudButton OnClick="@AddChip"
               Variant="@Variant.Filled">
        Add chip
    </MudButton>
</MudStack>

<MudDivider />

<MudStack>
    <MudChip T="string"
             OnClick="@OpenDialogAsync"
             Text="Click to open a dialog" />
</MudStack>
Examples.Code:
<MudStack Justify="@Justify.Center"
          Class="mud-width-full">
    <MudChipSet T="string"
                AllClosable="@true"
                CheckMark="@true"
                SelectionMode="@SelectionMode.MultiSelection"
                OnClose="@OnChipClosed">
        @for (var i = 0; i < _chips.Count; i++)
        {
            var localIndex = i;
            <MudChip Value="@_chips[localIndex]"
                     Color="@((Color)(localIndex % _numberOfColors))" />
        }
    </MudChipSet>
    <MudButton OnClick="@AddChip"
               Variant="@Variant.Filled">
        Add chip
    </MudButton>
</MudStack>

<MudDivider />

<MudStack>
    <MudChip T="string"
             OnClick="@OpenDialogAsync"
             Text="Click to open a dialog" />
</MudStack>

@code {
[Inject]
    private IDialogService DialogService { get; set; }

    private readonly List<string> _chips = ["Chip 1", "Chip 2", "Chip 3"];
    private int _chipCounter = 3;
    private int _numberOfColors = Enum.GetValues(typeof(Color)).Length;

    private void AddChip()
        => _chips.Add($"Chip {++_chipCounter}");

    private void OnChipClosed(MudChip<string> chip)
        => _chips.Remove(chip.Value);

    private Task OpenDialogAsync()
        => DialogService.ShowMessageBoxAsync("Dialog", "This is a dialog");
}
Examples.Title: For Keyboard Navigation

Components.Name: MudPopoverBase
Components.Summary: A base class for implementing Popover components.
Components.Description: This class provides a base implementation for a Popover component. It implements the <see cref="IPopover"/> interface and utilizes the <see cref="IPopoverService"/> to handle the creation, updating, and destruction of the popover.

Components.Name: MudChip
Components.Summary: Compact elements used to enter information, select a choice, filter content, or trigger an action.

Parameters.Description: Occurs when this chip is clicked.

Parameters.Description: Occurs when this chip has been closed.

Parameters.Description: Occurs when the <see cref="Selected"/> property has changed.

Components.Name: MudTimePicker
Components.Summary: Provides a simple way to select time values.
Components.Description: MudTimePicker supports keyboard navigation.

Parameters.Name: OpenTo
Parameters.Description: The initial view for this picker.

Parameters.Name: TimeEditMode
Parameters.Description: Controls which values can be edited.

Parameters.Name: ClosingDelay
Parameters.Description: The amount of time, in milliseconds, to wait before closing the picker.

Parameters.Name: AutoClose
Parameters.Description: Closes this picker when the value is set or cleared.

Parameters.Name: MinuteSelectionStep
Parameters.Description: The step interval when selecting minutes.

Parameters.Name: AmPm
Parameters.Description: Shows a 12-hour selection clock.

Parameters.Name: TimeFormat
Parameters.Description: The format applied to time values.

Parameters.Name: Time
Parameters.Description: The currently selected time.

Parameters.Name: TimeChanged
Parameters.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Time"/> has changed.

Events.Name: TimeChanged
Events.Description: Occurs when <see cref="Time"/> has changed.

Methods.Name: SelectTimeFromStick
Methods.Description: Updates the position of the hands on the clock.

Methods.Name: OnStickClick
Methods.Description: Performs the click action for the sticks.

Examples.Name: Action Buttons
Examples.RazorMarkup:
<MudTimePicker @ref="_picker" Label="With action buttons" AutoClose="@_autoClose">
    <PickerActions>
        <MudButton Class="mr-auto align-self-start" OnClick="@(() => _picker.ClearAsync())">Clear</MudButton>
        <MudButton OnClick="@(() => _picker.CloseAsync(false))">Cancel</MudButton>
        <MudButton Color="Color.Primary" OnClick="@(() => _picker.CloseAsync())">OK</MudButton>
    </PickerActions>
</MudTimePicker>
<MudSwitch @bind-Value="_autoClose" Color="Color.Secondary">AutoClose</MudSwitch>
Examples.Code:
<MudTimePicker @ref="_picker" Label="With action buttons" AutoClose="@_autoClose">
    <PickerActions>
        <MudButton Class="mr-auto align-self-start" OnClick="@(() => _picker.ClearAsync())">Clear</MudButton>
        <MudButton OnClick="@(() => _picker.CloseAsync(false))">Cancel</MudButton>
        <MudButton Color="Color.Primary" OnClick="@(() => _picker.CloseAsync())">OK</MudButton>
    </PickerActions>
</MudTimePicker>
<MudSwitch @bind-Value="_autoClose" Color="Color.Secondary">AutoClose</MudSwitch>

@code {
private MudTimePicker _picker;
    private readonly TimeSpan? _time = new TimeSpan(00, 45, 00);
    private bool _autoClose;
}
